actions.name: 调入客户编号
actions.caption: 调入客户编号
actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.kh_id 
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[未处理清单.发票号码]) 
  AND (cymx.khmc=[未处理清单.客户名称]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 计算-采购总价
actions.caption: 计算-采购总价
actions.expression: [未处理清单.出货数量]*[未处理清单.采购单价]

view.params:
SELECT cymx.khmc
FROM cymx
WHERE   (cymx.fphm=[未处理清单.发票号码])
